TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Brahim_Ghali, title = Brahim_Ghali, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Brahim_Ghali} }

S.FORM: Brahim Ghali Pulasin-Kali I 1949 a miheca saka 9 folad saka 16 a romi'ad masofoc ci Brahim Ghali, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Salawi-Arapiya Finawlan-Kapolong Kitakit o kallopitahidang 0 West sahara;Ť•ŅśííŚďąśčČ) anini i ci Brahim Ghali, patirengan a romi'ad i 2016 a miheca saka 7 folad saka 9 a romi'ad. kasofocan a loma' ŚáļÁĒüŚģ∂Śļ≠ lalamod ťÖćŚĀ∂ salikaka ŚÖĄŚľüŚßźŚ¶Ļ natayalan šļčŤĻü pitooran Śģóśēô
S.PHON: b~b~vrańßim *ńßa…ĺi po~u~u…ĺasin-ka…ĺi i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i b~b~vrańßim *ńßa…ĺi, ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u sa…ĺawi-arapija finaw…ĺan-kapo~u…ĺo~uŇč kitakit o~u ka…ĺ…ĺo~upitańßi…¨~…ģaŇč * w…ôst sańßara;****) anini i ¶i b~b~vrańßim *ńßa…ĺi, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ. kaso~ufo~u ¶an a …ĺo~uma ° **** …ĺa…ĺamo~u…¨~…ģ ** sa…ĺikaka **** nataja…ĺan ** pito~uo~uran **
S.FORM: Brahim Ghali Pulasin-Kali I 1949 a miheca saka 9 folad saka 16 a romi'ad masofoc ci Brahim Ghali, malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Salawi-Arapiya Finawlan-Kapolong Kitakit o kallopitahidang 0 West sahara;Ť•ŅśííŚďąśčČ) anini i ci Brahim Ghali, patirengan a romi'ad i 2016 a miheca saka 7 folad saka 9 a romi'ad. kasofocan a loma' ŚáļÁĒüŚģ∂Śļ≠ lalamod ťÖćŚĀ∂ salikaka ŚÖĄŚľüŚßźŚ¶Ļ natayalan šļčŤĻü pitooran Śģóśēô
